rows.label: qev087704_MSG0002
rows.name:
Yes. We've taken out five of
the Dolls. What about you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087704_MSG0003
rows.name:
Impressive. We have destroyed
four thus far. We know the
location of the last one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087704_MSG0004
rows.name: Are we sure that's all of them?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087704_MSG0006
rows.name:
Care to see which of us
can claim the final kill?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087704_MSG0007
rows.name:
Sounds like fun. Don't expect
me to go easy on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087704_MSG0008
rows.name: I would have it no other way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087704_MSG0009
rows.name: Will you send us the coordinates?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087704_MSG0010
rows.name:
I just did. May the gods of
war guide you in battle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087704_MSG0013
rows.name:
That Buidhe lady sure seems to
have had a change of heart, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087704_MSG0014
rows.name:
Perhaps she's finally
acknowledged us as friends.[ST:wait ]
